description: Computes perpendicular (normal) direction to a line or vector in 2D
utility: Get perpendicular unit vector for positioning and orthogonal constructions

arguments.name: object
arguments.type: line | vector | point point | number number

alternates: normal(p1, p2) - perpendicular to line p1→p2

examples.scenario: Normal of a vector in vector movements lesson
examples.expression: G=g2d(at(3,6),25,range(-1,5,1),type(geometry)); vector_1 = vector(G, point(G, 2.3, 1.2), point(G, 3.2, 1.7)); norm_1 = normal(G, vector_1)
